languages.text: "Оставьте эту низость: подкуп тут ни при чем! Род Зауэрбэк — люди незначительные, при дворе у них прискорбно малые привилегии. Их можно поманить одним обещанием высокого титула. Впрочем, теперь оный Изимонду не светит — ввиду исключительно длинного языка".

traits.locale_text: "Оставьте эту низость: подкуп тут ни при чем! Род Зауэрбэк — люди незначительные, при дворе у них прискорбно малые привилегии. Их можно поманить одним обещанием высокого титула. Впрочем, теперь оный Изимонду не светит — ввиду исключительно длинного языка".

languages.text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."
languages.original_text: "Оставьте эту низость: подкуп тут ни при чем! Род Зауэрбэк — люди незначительные, при дворе у них прискорбно малые привилегии. Их можно поманить одним обещанием высокого титула. Впрочем, теперь оный Изимонду не светит — ввиду исключительно длинного языка".

traits.locale_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

"No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

"No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

languages.text: “别用这种下作的暗示来污蔑我，这事和收买一点关系都没有！苏尔贝克家族不过是个无足轻重的小门小户，在宫廷里都没什么特权。想拉拢那种货色，唯一的办法就是许诺授予他贵族头衔。不过眼下伊西蒙德可没这个福分了，谁让他管不住自己的嘴。”
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: “别用这种下作的暗示来污蔑我，这事和收买一点关系都没有！苏尔贝克家族不过是个无足轻重的小门小户，在宫廷里都没什么特权。想拉拢那种货色，唯一的办法就是许诺授予他贵族头衔。不过眼下伊西蒙德可没这个福分了，谁让他管不住自己的嘴。”

languages.text: « Épargnez-moi vos insinuations grossières, il n'y a pas de soudoiement dans cette histoire ! Les Sauerback sont une famille insignifiante qui jouit de très peu de privilèges à la cour. Il n'y a qu'une seule chose qui est à même de les allécher : la promesse d'un titre de noblesse. Mais puisqu'Isimond n'a pas su tenir sa langue, le sien vient de lui passer sous le nez. »
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: « Épargnez-moi vos insinuations grossières, il n'y a pas de soudoiement dans cette histoire ! Les Sauerback sont une famille insignifiante qui jouit de très peu de privilèges à la cour. Il n'y a qu'une seule chose qui est à même de les allécher : la promesse d'un titre de noblesse. Mais puisqu'Isimond n'a pas su tenir sa langue, le sien vient de lui passer sous le nez. »

languages.text: "Böyle alçakça imalara gerek yok... Rüşvetin olayla alakası yok! Sauerbackler; sarayda acınası derecede az ayrıcalığa sahip, önemsiz insanlardır. Bu soydan birini cezbetmenin tek yolu, asalet ünvanı vaadidir. Fakat artık İsimond buna sahip olamayacak zira dilini tutamıyor."
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle alçakça imalara gerek yok... Rüşvetin olayla alakası yok! Sauerbackler; sarayda acınası derecede az ayrıcalığa sahip, önemsiz insanlardır. Bu soydan birini cezbetmenin tek yolu, asalet ünvanı vaadidir. Fakat artık İsimond buna sahip olamayacak zira dilini tutamıyor."

languages.text: «No hace falta que insinúe algo tan rastrero, ¡no hay soborno alguno de por medio! Los Sauerback son un grupo insignificante con pocos privilegios. La única forma de tentar a alguien así es con la promesa de un título nobiliario, pero ahora Isimond no lo recibirá, ya que no sabe contener su lengua».
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: «No hace falta que insinúe algo tan rastrero, ¡no hay soborno alguno de por medio! Los Sauerback son un grupo insignificante con pocos privilegios. La única forma de tentar a alguien así es con la promesa de un título nobiliario, pero ahora Isimond no lo recibirá, ya que no sabe contener su lengua».

languages.text: "Spart Euch Eure Andeutungen: Bestechung hatte nichts damit zu tun! Die Sauerbacks sind unbedeutende Leute mit armselig wenigen Privilegien am Hof. Wenn man sie mit etwas locken kann, dann mit der Aussicht auf einen Adelstitel. Aber nun wird ihn Isimond nicht bekommen, weil er seinen Mund nicht halten kann."
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: "Spart Euch Eure Andeutungen: Bestechung hatte nichts damit zu tun! Die Sauerbacks sind unbedeutende Leute mit armselig wenigen Privilegien am Hof. Wenn man sie mit etwas locken kann, dann mit der Aussicht auf einen Adelstitel. Aber nun wird ihn Isimond nicht bekommen, weil er seinen Mund nicht halten kann."

languages.text: 「そんな卑劣な陰口は必要ない。賄賂とは関係ない！ザウアーバック家は、宮廷でわずかな特権しか持たない、取るに足らない人たちだ。彼らを誘うには、貴族の称号を約束するしかない。しかし、今やイシモンドはそれを手に入れられない。彼は口を閉ざせないからだ。」
languages.original_text: "No need for such base insinuations: bribery had nothing to do with it! The Sauerbacks are insignificant people, with pitifully few privileges at court. The only way to entice one of that ilk is with the promise of a noble title. But now Isimond shall not have it, for he cannot hold his tongue."

traits.locale_text: 「そんな卑劣な陰口は必要ない。賄賂とは関係ない！ザウアーバック家は、宮廷でわずかな特権しか持たない、取るに足らない人たちだ。彼らを誘うには、貴族の称号を約束するしかない。しかし、今やイシモンドはそれを手に入れられない。彼は口を閉ざせないからだ。」
